Me

21 years old programmer, front-end web developer and fitness enthusiast.

I am a third grade student of Applied informatics at the Faculty of Informatics at Masaryk Universtity. I've been a part of either small scale and big scale projects running on various technologies.

Skills

I have deep knowledge of font-end web technologies and languages such as Javascript, Coffeescript, Typescript, Gulp, Grunt, Bower, CSS, LESS, SASS

Another part of my skillset is good knowledge of several imperative languages such as C, C++, C#, Java, Python, Javascript, Coffeescript, Typescript and basic knowledge of functional languages such as Haskell.

Besides computer science I aquired a lot of fitness information over the 6 year traning period and am fully capable of advising on the subject of personal training and nutrition.

My work

I have worked on several projects occupying various roles for the company I am working for.

Personal projects
